scripts.build:frontend: node scripts/copy-monaco.js && node scripts/copy-vendor.js && node scripts/bundle-css.js && cd src/public && tsc -p tsconfig.json && cd ../.. && node scripts/build-plugin-frontends.cjs
scripts.build:electron: tsc && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('src/electron/bridge.js','dist/electron/bridge.cjs'); require('fs').cpSync('src/electron/preload.cjs','dist/electron/preload.cjs'); require('fs').cpSync('src/electron/context-capture.js','dist/electron/context-capture.js');" && node scripts/copy-monaco.js && node scripts/copy-vendor.js && node scripts/bundle-css.js && cd src/public && tsc -p tsconfig.json && cd ../.. && node scripts/build-plugin-frontends.cjs && node scripts/build-icons.js
